subject: Alolan Graveler — a large crystalline rock creature with a dark, jagged body studded with visible mineral crystals. The Alolan form is confirmed by the dark coloration and crystalline surface texture (vs. the grey Kanto form). Horseshoe-shaped magnetic brow protrusion visible.
description: A bulky quadrupedal rock creature fills the center of the frame. Its body is dark grey-blue, heavily textured with angular crystal formations jutting from its surface. The characteristic horseshoe-shaped protrusion sits above its face. The background is a warm golden-yellow gradient with a faint landscape suggestion. The creature faces slightly forward and to the left, low to the ground in a wide-stance pose. Lighting is soft and diffuse from above.
foreground: large crystalline rock creature, dark body with jagged mineral outcroppings
background: warm golden-yellow gradient with faint landscape
emotion: sturdy, aggressive stance, low center of gravity
